title: Add Pollen Studio to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pollen Studio](https://pollenstudio.cru2.net) to build
- Pollen Studio is a static-files BYOP comparator for Pollinations.AI. Users connect via enter.pollinations.ai authorize flow and compare image, text, and TTS models side-by-side across three modes.

Fixes #11229

gist.headline: Welcome to Pollen Studio
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! Pollen Studio lets you compare image, text, and audio models side-by-side using your own Pollen pass.
gist.summary: Added Pollen Studio to the community showcase, a static-file comparator app that uses the Pollinations authorization flow to let users test image, text, and TTS models side-by-side.
gist.impact: Users can now easily evaluate and compare different AI models across three distinct modes in a single, unified interface.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a cozy art studio or laboratory, looking at multiple canvases or screens side-by-side to represent the 'comparator' aspect of the app. She wears a tiny painter's beret to fit the 'Studio' theme.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, standing in a warm digital studio. She is happily looking at three glowing retro monitors side-by-side showing different pixelated landscapes and text, representing a model comparator. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
